data.title: Institutional investors scale back Bitcoin ETF holdings amid market volatility in early 2025
data.description:
16-5-2025 – The opening months of 2025 have witnessed a marked shift in the landscape of spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), as major asset managers scaled back their investments amid a turbulent market. Regulatory filings submitted to the US SEC reveal that this retreat follows a 12% decline in Bitcoin’s price, coupled with shrinking returns [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/institutional-investors-scale-back-bitcoin-etf-holdings-amid-market-volatility-in-early-2025/

data.title: Coinbase drops 7% on customer breach, SEC probe into user numbers
data.description:
Coinbase stock dipped after news broke of a cyberattack that exposed customer data and an ongoing Securities and Exchange Commission investigation over misstated user numbers in 2021. The double whammy of bad news rattled investors as company stock (COIN) slid 7% in a fall to $244 in after-hours trading on May 15, according to Google Finance.   Coinbase stock 24 hours
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/coinbase-drops-7-on-staff-breach-sec-probe-into-user-numbers?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BitMart Lists NKN (NKN)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch NKN (NKN) at 12:00 (Eastern Time) on May 16, and the NKN/USDT trading pair will be launched.
Nkn (New Network) is a new network infrastructure and ecosystem driven by blockchain technology, which is open, decentralized, and community-shared. Nkn encourages users to share excess network bandwidth, assists equipment service providers to effectively configure network resources, and encourages individuals and enterprises to deploy more nodes to join the network and provide data transmission services to other nodes, thereby obtaining economic returns. Nkn's goal is to use blockchain technology to create new opportunities for network transmission and solve the problems of resource allocation, transmission efficiency, and value transmission in the current network. Following the computing power of the Ethereum blockchain and the storage capacity of the Filecoin/IPFS blockchain, Nkn has become a public chain infrastructure that has blockchainized another core element of information technology - network transmission resources. Its technological innovation lies in dynamic routing, network relay proof, highly scalable consensus mechanism, and resource sharing incentives. Nkn token is the original token in the Nkn ecosystem economy, used to encourage network resource sharing and effectively utilize excess network bandwidth.

data.title: Binance Alpha now supports SuiNS
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official page, Binance Alpha has newly launched SuiNS (NS).

data.title: Pharos Network testnet launched, focusing on RWA track 30,000 TPS high performance
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Pharos Network, a Layer 1 public chain focusing on RWA, announced the official launch of the test network. The network adopts a modular design to achieve 30,000 TPS processing capacity and sub-second transaction confirmation. It is compatible with EVM and integrates ZK compliance verification and decentralized AI functions, aiming to solve the scalability and compliance requirements of institutional-level DeFi. 
It is reported that Pharos was founded by the former core blockchain team of Ant Digital Technology. Its innovative architecture will increase storage efficiency by 80% and has a built-in privacy protection system. The test network is now open for experience, and the main network plans to support 50,000 TPS, focusing on RWA scenarios such as green finance and real estate securitization.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETFs Experience Significant Net Inflows and Outflows
data.description: According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on May 15 (Eastern Time), Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $115 million. The Blackrock ETF IBIT recorded the highest single-day net inflow of $410 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $45.423 billion. Conversely, the Ark Invest and 21Shares ETF ARKB experienced the largest single-day net outflow of $132 million, with its historical total net inflow standing at $2.567 billion. As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $121.469 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 5.91% compared to Bitcoin's total market value. The cumulative historical net inflow has reached $41.514 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs had a total net outflow of $39.7859 million yesterday, with only BlackRock ETF ETHA achieving net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 15, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was 39.7859 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of 8.4347 million US dollars. Currently, ETHA has a total net inflow of 4.263 billion US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of 31.6156 million US dollars. Currently, FETH has a total net inflow of 1.393 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 8.742 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.85%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.489 billion US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $115 million yesterday, with only BlackRock ETF IBIT achieving net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 15, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$115 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of US$410 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached US$45.423 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a net outflow of US$132 million in a single day. Currently, ARKB's total net inflow in history has reached US$2.567 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$121.469 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) reached 5.91%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$41.514 billion.

data.title: A whale deposited 49,858 SOLs to Kraken in the early morning, with a loss of 3.11 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale deposited 49,858 SOL (about 8.46 million US dollars) to Kraken 7 hours ago, with a loss of 3.11 million US dollars. 
6 months ago, the whale withdrew 48,185 SOL (about 11.58 million US dollars) from Kraken at a unit price of 240 US dollars and pledged it. 
During this period, he obtained 1,673 SOL (about 286,000 US dollars) in pledge income, but eventually lost 3.11 million US dollars due to the decline in the price of the currency.

data.title: California state pension fund discloses purchase of $276 million worth of Strategy stock
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin Magazine reporter @Vivek4real published an article on the X platform, revealing that the California Pension Fund disclosed that it had purchased $276 million worth of Strategy (stock code: MSTR) shares, indirectly investing in Bitcoin.

data.title: B² Network launches on-chain AI collaboration basic protocol: Signal-Driven Agentic AI
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News B² Network officially released the Signal-Driven Agentic AI protocol on May 15, a set of on-chain infrastructure designed for multi-agent (AI Agents) collaboration. The protocol supports AI division of labor, native on-chain, and auditable tracking, and is committed to building an open, efficient, and reliable AI collaborative network.
The system breaks down the Agent workflow into five steps: Sense, Plan, Decide, Act, and Learn. Each step is handled by a different "expert agent" and connected and scheduled through on-chain Signal events. Finally, it is submitted, aggregated, and anchored in Bitcoin through B² Rollup and B² Hub. All operations are signed on the chain, which is auditable, traceable, supports paid subscriptions and privacy protection. It is a truly intelligent Agent collaboration flow that is suitable for Web3.
Users can obtain on-chain benefits by running Agents and participate in network governance and system growth. The project party said that the protocol is not only an upgrade of AI infrastructure, but also a key step in promoting the Bitcoin network to move towards a smart collaborative future.

data.title: Fold Holdings Reports Increased Revenue Amid Rising Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
According to PANews, Fold Holdings, a Bitcoin financial services company, reported a first-quarter revenue of $7.1 million, marking a 44% increase compared to the previous year. However, the company's net loss widened to $48.9 million. 

Fold Holdings' Bitcoin holdings have grown to 1,490 BTC, valued at $150 million, representing a 50% increase from the fourth quarter of last year. The company's trading platform processed $250 million in transaction volume during the first quarter, with active accounts surpassing 600,000.

In February of this year, Fold Holdings completed its listing on Nasdaq. Currently, the value of its Bitcoin holdings accounts for approximately 35% of its market capitalization.
